decisions_locked.R1_ui_scope: Full design-brief screen 5 (CanvasStage + TextLayerOverlay + ToolRail + HistoryTimeline)
decisions_locked.R2_history_model: Command pattern + fabric JSON snapshot per op, bounded stack cap 50; image_edits Postgres row per inpaint op only; canvas-only ops in-memory
decisions_locked.R3_ocr_engine: PaddleOCR server-side, exposed at POST /api/images/{id}/ocr; FakeOCR in tests/editor/conftest.py; AC#2 ratio formula sum(IoU>=0.5)/sum(ground_truth) >= 0.90 on 10 zh fixtures
decisions_locked.R4_inpaint_provider: Add ImageEdit Protocol to services/providers/base.py (5th provider role); image_edit required at startup like compliance_screen; apimart adapter for GPT-Image-2 /v1/images/edits; FakeImageEdit composites via Pillow on mask_box deterministic bytes
decisions_locked.R5_minio_strategy: Sidecar pattern: kits/{id}/edited/{image_id}.png overwritten per inpaint; original at kits/{id}/{hero|detail}/{image_id}.png immutable; EPIC-7 falls back to original if sidecar absent; revert = DELETE sidecar + INSERT op_type=revert image_edits row
decisions_locked.R6_ac1_scripted_ops: Op1=edit_text canvas-only -> Op2=move_layer canvas-only -> Op3=inpaint AI; +1 undo +1 redo for AC#5 sanity; budget ~30s real-time vs 90s ceiling
decisions_locked.R7_fabric_ssr_lifecycle: Dynamic import ssr:false + useEffect dispose + mount-guard useRef for StrictMode double-mount; HMR triggers clean dispose+recreate (canvas state lost dev-only); imperative-only inside fabric event handlers, single setState commit on mouse:up
decisions_locked.R8_toolrail_states: 6-button MVP (Select/Text/Move/Inpaint/Undo/Redo) with 4 states each (idle|active|disabled|loading); keyboard V/T/M/I/Ctrl+Z/Ctrl+Shift+Z; Inpaint loading = spinner + cancellable via AbortController + disabled siblings during SSE stream
